reach_why: Mostly extends known critiques of linguistic reasoning and search; little genuinely new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links Einstein, search-space priors, urgency bias, and epistemic honesty into one critique.
falsifiable_why: Testable via counterexamples: systems succeeding mathematically from verbal search, or urgency not increasing fluff acceptance.
explanation: Language can mimic discovery, but real progress may require mathematical representations criticism can actually survive.
